actions.title: When Your AI Coding Agent Gets Stuck: How to Stop the Infinite Tool Loop
Can You Actually Run AI Coding Agents Offline? A Practical Guide to Local LLM Development

actions.change: Removed spidering auto-perma-block logic from channel_spidering_guard.py. Cooldown alone is sufficient — the auto-block was incorrectly treating crontab+status-check hits as "rapid attempts" and permanently blocking the telegraph cross-posting lane.
actions.after: telegraph returns cooldown_active with legitimate remaining time (5.1h)
actions.root_cause: SPIDERING_THRESHOLD=3 fired when manual run + crontab + status check all hit within 6h cooldown window. Three hits in 6h is normal for a cron that fires 3x/day.

cross_posting_pipeline: wired (prior run), cooldown clears at ~14:00 CEST
